message:
fix: mobile responsive cards - single column on mobile, stats 2 per row (#366)

- Update all dashboard grids to use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 for
  single-column layout on mobile
- Add useMobile hook to SortableCard components to conditionally apply
  gridColumn span only on desktop (isMobile ? 'span 1' : `span ${cardWidth}`)
- Update StatsOverview and StatsRuntime to show max 2 columns on mobile
  (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4/6/8/10 based on block count)

Files updated:
- 22 page components with grid layouts
- SortableClusterCard, DashboardComponents for card width handling
- StatsOverview.tsx, StatsRuntime.tsx for stats grid responsiveness

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -82,11 +83,13 @@ const SortableArcadeCard = memo(function SortableArcadeCard({
     transition,
   } = useSortable({ id: card.id })
 
+  const { isMobile } = useMobile()
   const cardWidth = card.position?.w || 4
   const style = {
     transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
     transition,
-    gridColumn: `span ${cardWidth}`,
+    // Only apply multi-column span on desktop; mobile uses single column
+    gridColumn: isMobile ? 'span 1' : `span ${cardWidth}`,
     opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   }
